page: Microsoft Azure NC72lds_xl_RTXPRO6000BSE_v6 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine belonging to the NCdsRTXPRO6000BSEv6XL family. It features 72 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs powered by an Intel processor and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is configured with a low-memory profile of 132.0 GB RAM, yielding approximately 1.83 GB of memory per core.

For storage-intensive tasks, the server includes 3960 GB of local disk storage and is premium storage capable, allowing for high-throughput disk configurations. It is equipped with a single GPU to accelerate parallel processing workloads. The system does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the hardware allocation prioritizes high compute density and local storage capacity over system memory. This resource distribution makes it a specialized option for workloads that require significant CPU and GPU processing power but have modest memory footprints. Suitable workloads include GPU-accelerated rendering, machine learning inference, data processing, and compute-heavy simulation tasks that can leverage the local storage.
description: Microsoft Azure NC72lds_xl_RTXPRO6000BSE_v6 is a GPU-accelerated virtual machine from the NCdsRTXPRO6000BSEv6XL family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 72 dedicated x86_64 Intel vCPUs, 132.0 GB of system memory, and a single GPU. This low-memory configuration provides 1.83 GB of RAM per core, making it highly compute-dense. The instance is equipped with 3960 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, offering substantial local capacity for data-intensive operations. Because the hardware profile prioritizes raw processing cores and GPU acceleration over memory capacity, it delivers a cost-efficient structure for workloads that do not require massive RAM arrays. This server is optimized for parallel processing tasks, machine learning inference, 3D rendering, and compute-heavy simulations that benefit from high-speed local storage.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NC72lds_xl_RTXPRO6000BSE_v6 is a GPU-accelerated server with 72 Intel vCPUs, 132 GB RAM, a single GPU, and 3960 GB of local storage, optimized for compute-heavy and rendering workloads.

tagline: A GPU-accelerated, compute-dense server featuring seventy-two dedicated cores and substantial local storage for parallel processing workloads.

Single GPU for hardware-accelerated parallel processing
132.0 GB of system memory optimized for low-memory compute tasks
